item.title: Highlander reboot gains a new production update with Henry Cavill
item.description: A new production update mentions the Highlander reboot, Henry Cavill, and Chad Stahelski.

item.title: Toyota Highlander receives new trim package
item.description: This should be rejected by exclusion terms.

item.title: USDA announces food safety recall guidance update
item.description: The USDA issued a food safety guidance update related to recall procedures.
